Where Does Alaskan Pollock End Up?

Pollock, fished in Alaska, rarely stays there. The Bering Sea and Gulf of Alaska fuel

the world's pollock demand. But, the waters have been in crisis for years.

CANADA (15)

FINLAND (123)

NETHERLANDS (22)

POLAND (19)

GERMANY (14)

JAPAN (2)

UNITED STATES OF AMERICA (19)

PAKISTAN (3)

CHINA (339)

TAIWAN (2)

INDIA (17)

VIETNAM (57)
